title: Quartz weapon/tool trims
description: Makes netherite shovel, sword, hoe, axe, and pickaxe have a quartz trim to match armor. Makes trident netherite colored with quartz trim to match.
body: Makes netherite shovel, sword, hoe, axe, and pickaxe have a quartz trim to match quartz trimmed netherite armor. Makes trident netherite colored with quartz trim to match.
